title: Madha Matthu Manasi
subTitle: Madha is in love with Manasi, but she has feelings for someone else. Soon, he helps her unite with her lover and also strives to save her from some goons.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's three sons, Tarakaksha, Vidyunmali, and Kamalaksha, possess immense power. Shambuki discloses that they are engaged in rigorous penance to appease Brahma Deva and obtain a crucial boon. Will Brahma Deva grant their earnest request?

title: Minchina Ota
subTitle: Two petty thieves rope other small-time criminals into their get-rich-quick schemes and attempt to steal cars for a living.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura receives word of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati's newborn and sets out to locate him. Meanwhile, Karthikeya engages in battle with Tarakasura's followers to demonstrate Lord Shiva's supremacy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shankachuda, having lost his men in the battle, extends an invitation to Kartikeya to confront Tarakasura. Will Kartikeya accept Shankachuda's challenge and face Tarakasura in battle?

title: Thavarige Baa Thangi
subTitle: Lakshmi faces trouble when her in-laws hurl a false accusation at her. However, Lakshmi's brother is determined to stand by her side.

title: Gokarna
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Iruvudellava Bittu
subTitle: Poorvi, an independent woman, leaves her family and boyfriend, Dev, due to her ego and self-conceit. Despite making several imprudent decisions, her life comes back on track after meeting Akash.

title: Chennamma IPS
subTitle: When an honest police officer, Chennamma, learns about Appanna, a gangster, and his cruel son's tyranny, she decides to kill them and eliminate all the anti-social elements of society.

title: Chitta Chora
subTitle: A modern-day Robin Hood steals money from the rich to help the poor. Trouble ensues when his theft results in the kidnapping of a corrupt minister's daughter.

title: Akira
subTitle: Two heartbroken individuals find solace in each other. However, complications arise when the man discovers his new love interest is close friends with his ex.

title: Akira
subTitle: Two heartbroken individuals find solace in each other. However, complications arise when the man discovers his new love interest is close friends with his ex.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati are overwhelmed with eternal joy as Devi Swaroopa brings forth their son, Kartikeya, after receiving a boon from Lord Brahma. How will the divine couple's hearts swell with love when they cradle their newborn.

title: Nan Magale Heroine
subTitle: A struggling filmmaker after his back to back flops finally finds a producer willing to fund his next movie. However, he has a condition that the director has to cast his daughter as the heroine.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva chooses to partake in the feast sent by Nandi and the devotees instead of Kartikeya's offering, which disappoints Parvati. Later, Shiva becomes concerned when Kartikeya discovers their true relationship.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati, concerned about Kartikeya's decision to engage in battle against Tarakasura's sons, expresses her worry, prompting her to implore Shiva to ensure Kartikeya's safety from the impending danger. Will Lord Shiva come to his son's aid?

title: Chitta Chora
subTitle: A modern-day Robin Hood steals money from the rich to help the poor. Trouble ensues when his theft results in the kidnapping of a corrupt minister's daughter.

title: Neelakanta
subTitle: A man is obedient towards his mother and overcomes all the obstacles life throws his way. Unfortunately, his mother disapproves of his marriage and causes problems for him.

title: Kaamannana Makkalu
subTitle: With the help of his two sons, Kaamanna, a former thief, decides to start a new life on the right side of the law.

title: Bairagee
subTitle: Upon moving to a new city with his friend who is a policeman, Huli stumbles upon a shocking incident that enrages him and sets him on the path to seeking justice.

title: Sirivantha
subTitle: Narayana Murthy wages a courageous battle to withstand all pressures and fight against corruption to retain the values he has cherished.

title: Ondagi Baalu
subTitle: After finishing his education, Tyagaraj, a young man, marries Leela, his girlfriend. Things change when her prideful nature causes her to separate him from his family.

title: Ondagi Baalu
subTitle: After finishing his education, Tyagaraj, a young man, marries Leela, his girlfriend. Things change when her prideful nature causes her to separate him from his family.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura receives word of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati's newborn and sets out to locate him. Meanwhile, Karthikeya engages in battle with Tarakasura's followers to demonstrate Lord Shiva's supremacy.

title: Plus
subTitle: Jai decides to protect himself from his enemies. To everyone's surprise, he recruits a team of people with various psychological disorders to help him.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva sets Tarakasura's sons and Asura Guru free from captivity, cautioning them about their inevitable downfall in their next confrontation. Will Tarakasura's sons heed this warning seriously?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya transforms into Sadananda with six faces as his mothers attempt to feed him. Meanwhile, Tarakasura's sons conduct a dark ritual, summoning Goddess Parvati.

title: Sirivantha
subTitle: Narayana Murthy wages a courageous battle to withstand all pressures and fight against corruption to retain the values he has cherished.

title: Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: When forest officer Kumar protects natural resources from poachers, their boss, Anand, becomes his main rival. But little does Kumar know that Anand is his brother.

title: ABHIMANYU
subTitle: Arjun seeks to change the education system by putting his life at risk to nationalise private schools in the country. Will he succeed in his efforts?

title: Mahakshathriya
subTitle: A young man, who is short-tempered, is sent to jail for committing a murder. However, his life takes a turn for the better when a prison officer tries to bring about a change in him.

title: Aajay
subTitle: Ajay, a kabaddi player, hides Padma from Veerabhadra, a gangster who wants to force her into marrying him. Soon, the two fall in love.

title: Pakkadmane Hudugi
subTitle: Balu, a 26-year-old bachelor, falls in love with his neighbour's daughter, Indu. He decides to woo her with the help of his music composer friend, Chakravarthy.
